nodes.name: 00__packages.config
nodes.summary: Elastic Beanstalk extension installing OS-level yum packages (git, xmlsec1, xmlsec1-openssl) required for SAML/XML signing support on the deployment host.

nodes.name: 01__upgrade_pip.config
nodes.summary: Elastic Beanstalk extension that upgrades pip in the application virtualenv before dependency installation during deployment.

nodes.name: 02__collectstatic.config
nodes.summary: Elastic Beanstalk container command running Django collectstatic to gather static assets during deployment.

nodes.name: 03__django.config
nodes.summary: Elastic Beanstalk option settings defining the WSGI entry path (app/wsgi.py) and static file mapping for the Django Python container.

nodes.name: 04__wsgi_custom.config
nodes.summary: Elastic Beanstalk extension that injects a custom Apache/httpd config enabling WSGIPassAuthorization and gzip (mod_deflate) compression for text and JSON responses.
nodes.languageNotes: Embeds a heredoc Apache config; WSGIPassAuthorization is required to forward Authorization headers to the Django app behind mod_wsgi.

nodes.name: .ebignore
nodes.summary: Empty Elastic Beanstalk ignore file controlling which files are excluded from the deployment bundle uploaded by the EB CLI.

nodes.name: .nvmrc
nodes.summary: Node Version Manager pin specifying the Node.js version used by tooling in the API directory.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore patterns for the Understand-Anything codebase analysis tool, excluding generated, vendored, and irrelevant paths from knowledge-graph scanning.

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Configuration for the Understand-Anything analysis tool, setting the output language for generated knowledge-graph content.

nodes.name: apps.py
nodes.summary: Django AppConfig for the api_keys app, which manages master API key issuance and validation.

nodes.summary: Django AppConfig declaring the api_keys application for app registry and autodiscovery.

nodes.name: apps.py
nodes.summary: Django AppConfig for the audit app that wires up audit-log signal handlers when the application is ready.

nodes.name: AuditConfig
nodes.summary: Django AppConfig for the audit app; its ready() hook imports the signals module to register audit-log signal receivers at startup.

nodes.name: openapi.py
nodes.summary: drf-spectacular OpenAPI schema extension that documents the polymorphic trait value field as accepting string, integer, number, or boolean.

nodes.name: TraitValueFieldExtension
nodes.summary: OpenApiSerializerFieldExtension that maps the TraitValueField to an OpenAPI schema allowing string, integer, number, or boolean values.
